articles.author: Elena  Giuliano
articles.title: How the Iran war has put the small island of Cyprus abruptly on Europe's security radar - CBS News
articles.description: When it comes to European Union territory, you can't go much further east than Cyprus. So far east, in fact, that it's within reach of Iran's weapons.
articles.content: French President Emmanuel Macron visited the eastern Mediterranean island of Cyprus on Monday to discuss regional security after a British military base there was targeted in an Iranian drone attack.… [+4716 chars]
